items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time-limited offers.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of time-limited offers expiring in 2 hours, but the evidence does not provide concrete confirmation that this functionality is implemented. While the linked use case mentions time-limited offers, there is no direct evidence showing that the system enforces this expiration or how it manages the timing of offers. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of specific evidence regarding the expiration mechanism.
